oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
now: Closing the last session no longer closes its workspace — the workspace stays alive and its content area shows a new 'No Sessions' create-session empty state (new SessionEmptyStateView). Auto-close cascade (SessionCollection→Workspace.onEmpty→removeWorkspace) removed; explicit workspace close unchanged. Built + tianTests green on branch worktree-workspace-survives-empty; pending GUI live-check + merge.
next: Remote-workspace phase 2: forward the IPC socket + install shell integration remotely so a remote Claude pane gets live busy/idle, auto-title, and OSC-7 pwd tracking (deferred from PR #66).
Daily-drive the shipped app (now v1.5.3) and triage regressions; small follow-up candidates: Reset Name (custom→auto), worktree-leak-on-close, Escape-vs-⌘W placeholder binding.
Validate the /tian implement harness (bumped to v1.2.0 for the session model) on a real multi-slice run: async fan-out overlap + structured handoff (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Released v1.5.3 — Session Overview card no longer shows harness-injected synthetic turns (e.g. a background-subagent <task-notification> wrapper) in the 'latest user prompt' line; the UserPromptSubmit hook (tian-hook-prompt.sh) now rejects a prompt whose leading content is an injected wrapper tag (task-notification / system-reminder / local-command-* / command-* / bash-*) before forwarding, so only genuine typed input updates the card (PR #75). Added a standalone bash test that stubs the $TIAN_CLI_PATH seam (10 cases: 5 rejected, 5 forwarded, incl. a tag-boundary case). Medium code-review: no findings. Built (build 457), notarized (Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast live.

Released v1.5.2 — Claude session macOS notifications de-noised: a banner now fires only when a session needs you (task done / input needed / AskUserQuestion), driven by ClaudeSessionState transitions instead of forwarding every OSC desktop notification, and suppressed for the session you're actively viewing (PR #72). Also gitignored graphify dated-snapshot + AST-cache dirs (#73, #74). Medium code-review caught a surface-id→pane wiring bug (fixed pre-merge); live-verified in a debug build. Built, notarized (Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast (build 449) live.

Released v1.5.1 — Session Overview redesigned as one unified card grid that fills the width regardless of workspace (was per-workspace stacked grids + section headers); workspace identity moved into a per-card, width-capped chip and the keyboard-selected card gets a blue glow. Ported from the 'Cards Grid' Claude Design; medium code-review pass applied (chip-vs-title layout, VoiceOver label, doc). PR #71. Built, notarized (Accepted), stapled; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast live.
